allow: PowerShell(Get-Command conda -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; if \(-not $?\) { Write-Output "NO_CONDA" }; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\miniconda3\\Scripts\\conda.exe","$env:USERPROFILE\\anaconda3\\Scripts\\conda.exe","C:\\ProgramData\\miniconda3\\Scripts\\conda.exe","C:\\ProgramData\\anaconda3\\Scripts\\conda.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName })

PowerShell($zip = "C:\\Users\\USER\\Downloads\\augmented_dataset-20260511T122321Z-3-001.zip"; $out = "C:\\Users\\USER\\Desktop\\final_proj_digital_image\\dataset"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $out\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $out | Out-Null }; Expand-Archive -Path $zip -DestinationPath $out -Force; Get-ChildItem $out -Recurse -Directory | Select-Object -First 10 FullName)

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\("C:\\Users\\USER\\Downloads\\archive.zip"\); $dirs = $zip.Entries | ForEach-Object { Split-Path $_.FullName -Parent } | Sort-Object -Unique; "DIRECTORIES:"; $dirs -join "`n"; "---"; "SAMPLE FILES:"; $zip.Entries | Select-Object -First 5 FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }; "---"; "Total entries: $\($zip.Entries.Count\)"; $zip.Dispose\(\))
